aspect.name: Aspect of Prowess
aspect.description: Combat Dodge can now be recast after striking a Jungle Monster or Boss, with Spear Strike gaining increased Scaling when forgoing your Armor. Radiant Glory no longer grants increased Protections or Crowd Control Reduction.

abilityOverrides.A02:
You are blessed by the Gods, gaining bonus Strength for a short duration. Damaging enemies with abilities during this time Heals you.

  • When Armored, the Gods’ blessings also grant you a Physical Shield.
  • When forgoing your Armor, hitting an enemy god with your attacks from behind reduces their Protections.
abilityOverrides.A03:
Dodge in your current direction and ready your spear to strike enemies for {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage. Hitting a God or Jungle Monster with the strike allows you to recast the ability once before it goes on cooldown.

  • When Armored, striking an enemy god with your spear Slows them, stacking up to 2 times.
  • When forgoing your Armor, the speed of your dodge is doubled, and Spear Strike has increased Scaling.

aspect.name: Aspect of Combustion
aspect.description: Your Basic Attacks now ignite enemies dealing damage over time and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume ignites dealing a burst of damage. Rain of Fire deals reduced damage.

abilityOverrides.A04:
Summon a meteor, dealing {DamageTalent1_Formula} [{DamageTalent1_Scaling_Percent}]Magical Damage. You can have up to 3 charges of this ability.

• Ignites Noxious Fumes

aspect.name: Aspect Of Valor
aspect.description: Divine Presence now defaults to Red Buff, and when activated you gain Movement Speed, Haste, and Basic Attack Power in addition to the original effects. It no longer alternates to Gold Buff, or Heals you when activated.

aspect.name: Aspect of Pride
aspect.description: Enfeeble no longer Debuffs enemies but dealing damage to the same enemy god with Basic Attacks provides you up to 100% bonus Attack Speed.

aspect.name: Aspect of Harmony
aspect.description: Audacity now grants free So Beautiful casts but no Attack Speed. So Beautiful scales with item Health, lowers enemy Attack Speed, and grants nearby allies Attack Speed on God or Boss hits, but deals less Base Damage. Serenade now shields nearby allies and Protections while it holds. Buffing an ally grants an Audacity stack.

aspect.name: Aspect of Reverberation
aspect.description: Call to Arms no longer grants Protections, Regen, or affects allies. Instead, Ares empowers his Shield for his next Basic Attack, stunning the target and spreading damage to nearby enemies.

abilityOverrides.A02:
You gain Basic Attack Damage, and empower your Shield for your next Basic Attack.

  • Damaging enemy gods increases the duration and the effects of this buff.
  • Upon damaging an enemy with your empowered Shield, the target is Stunned and bonus Magical Damage is spread to nearby enemies.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Wild
aspect.description: Transgressor's Fate no longer roots or cripples gods but can now target minions. Triggered traps now also heal Artemis and deal damage to enemies in a larger area.

abilityOverrides.A01: Place a trap on the ground. Enemies that come in contact with it activate it, causing it to repeatedly deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage in an area over 3s.

aspect.name: Aspect of War
aspect.description: Defender of Olympus now targets visible enemy gods instead of allies, dealing no landing damage but causing the enemy to take increased damage while Athena is channeling.

abilityOverrides.A04:
Teleport to an enemy god, anywhere on the map.

  • While channeling, the enemy targeted is Debuffed and takes increased damage
  • After teleporting, you gain a {Shield_Formula} [{Shield_Scaling_Scaling_Percent}] Health Shield.
  • You are CC Immune while using this ability

aspect.name: Aspect of the Unburdened
aspect.description: DNT

aspect.name: Aspect of Revelry
aspect.description: After using Chug, your inhand attacks cleave and deal bonus damage scaling with Strength instead of Protections, for a short duration.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Take a drink, Healing for {Heal_Formula}, and becoming more Drunk.

  • You also gain increased Strength and Intelligence
  • Your basic attacks cleave and deal an additional {Talent_Damage_Formula} [{Talent_Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage

aspect.name: Aspect of Hysteria
aspect.description: Hysteria applied over max deals damage. Max Hysteria no longer reduces damage. Consign Spirits only heals Baron. Vivid Gaze bonus now grants Hysteria over time, but no debuff.  Wrap It Up explosion and DoT apply Bonus Hysteria, but the explosion no longer Mesmerizes. Your personal Brew can be thrown every 20s.

aspect.name: Aspect of Vindication
aspect.description: Bludgeon no longer deals bonus Final Slam Damage but whenever you gain Block stacks with Sword and Shield or gain Healing from Scourge, nearby allied gods also gain those benefits.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Dash forward with your shield to deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Slow enemies in front of you.

  • Gain 1 Block stack for each enemy god hit
  • Change to Sword and Shield basic attacks
  • Every third successful basic attack grants a Block stack, reflecting damage
  • Whenever you gain a Block stack, nearby allied gods also do as well
abilityOverrides.A03:
Lash out with your Scourge to deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Disarm enemies.

  • Change to Scourge basic attacks
  • Your basic attacks Heal you and nearby allied gods

abilityOverrides.A01:
Become enraged, increasing your Movement Speed and Attack Speed. While active, your next successful Basic Attack will Slow and deal bonus {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

  • Gain Haste and Immunity to Slows and Roots while this effect is active.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Clash your shields, unleashing a concussive blast that deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage. Dealing damage charges your shields.

  • At Max Stacks, gain access to Enhanced Refraction Shield on a separate cooldown.
  • Enhanced Refraction Shield’s concussive blast deals {TalentEnhancedDamage_Formula} [{TalentEnhancedDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.
  • Restores Mana per enemy hit by Refraction Shield, or Health per enemy hit by Enhanced Refraction Shield.
abilityOverrides.A03:
Summon a vision that repeatedly deals {TalentTickDamage_Formula} [{TalentTickDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to nearby enemies.

  • Before disappearing the vision does a final slam, dealing {TalentFinalDamage_Formula} [{TalentFinalDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage, Slowing and Crippling enemies.
abilityOverrides.A04:
Teleport to the target location, then Stomp the ground to create a fissure that deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies in its path. From the fissure, five pieces of earth erupt to form a wall.

  • Refire the ability to destroy all pieces at once.

aspect.name: Aspect of Souls
aspect.description: Ghastly Breath ticks an additional time for every 3 god souls you have killed but souls no longer heal. Stygian Torment now only knocks up targets.

abilityOverrides.A02: Every 3 God Soul kills causes this ability to tick an additional time
abilityOverrides.A03:
Leap forward dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies and severing their souls when you land.

•Killing a soul reduces Soul Expulsion's cooldown by 2s
abilityOverrides.A04:
Knock Up nearby enemy Gods, severing their souls and dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to them.

• Using this ability alerts all of your heads

aspect.name: Aspect of Strife
aspect.description: Your Basic Attacks are now melee and deal increased damage, cleave, and apply stronger Shifter of Seasons effects to all enemies hit. In addition, Horn Charge's cooldown is reduced when hitting a god or Jungle Monster and applies Shifter of Seasons.

abilityOverrides.A03: Hitting an enemy god decreases the cooldown of this ability by 4s or 2s for Jungle Monsters.

aspect.name: Aspect of Fulmination
aspect.description: Rain Dance no longer heals or grants Overflow stacks but damages enemies in the area instead. Torrent max stacks are decreased.

abilityOverrides.A03:
Create a rainstorm dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] PhysicalDamage repeatedly to enemies in an area.

  • Enemies caught in the rain are Slowed and have reduced Attack Speed
  • If the Axe is deployed, create a second rainstorm there
  • Reduces enemy Healing

aspect.name: Aspect of Love
aspect.description: Heart Bomb's damage is decreased but the enemy hit has reduced Attack Speed and the explosion area heals allies. At 8 stacks of Lovestruck, allies also gain a Health Shield.

aspect.name: Aspect of Ferocity
aspect.description: Horrible Burns no longer burns but provides Lifesteal and lasts for a short duration. One Thousand Cuts fires 2 swings, increasing at Attack Speed thresholds and deals Attack damage. Trickster Spirit does less damage but provides an Attack Speed buff.

abilityOverrides.A01:
While active, you gain Lifesteal, your Attacks Slow, and deal bonus {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
  • The nearest enemy god below a health threshold is marked, reducing this ability's cooldown rapidly
  • Hitting a marked enemy god with this ability provides a stack. Every 4 stacks permanently increases its damage
abilityOverrides.A02:
Strike enemies ahead of you 2 times, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
  • On obtaining 1.5/2.5 Attack Speed you strike up to 4/6 times
  • While channelling you gain Movement Speed and Mitigate Damage dealt by enemy gods behind you
  • Additionally you are Slow Immune and Immune to strafe and backpedal movement penalties
abilityOverrides.A03: Teleport to a target character or ward after a short delay, gaining Attack Speed and dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage in an area.

aspect.name: Aspect of Fellowship
aspect.description: Alluring Spirits no longer throws out a sake bottle but instead spawns 2 Clones. All of your Clones deal more damage and take less damage.

abilityOverrides.A02: Drink some sake, Healing for {Heal_Formula} [{Heal_Scaling_Percent}] Health every {Heal_Period}s for {Heal_Duration}s before conjuring 2 Clones.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Gilded Victor
aspect.description: Contest of Gods only provides you extra Attack Damage from Intelligence. Unruly Magic does not explode but returns back, dealing damage and providing a stack causing your next Attacks to explode. Erratic Behavior no longer creates a field or Stealth but Attack Speed and Attack Damage. Golden Apple of Discord is faster and does not spread.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Fire out an orb of unruly magic dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage before returning back dealing {TalentDamageReturn_Formula} [{TalentDamageReturn_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

• Hitting enemy gods provides a stack causing your next Attacks that hit an enemy to explode in minor projectiles that deal {TalentSmallDamage_Formula} Magical Damage as Attack Damage
abilityOverrides.A03: Leap and gain Movement Speed, Attack Speed and Attack Damage.
abilityOverrides.A04:
Throw the Golden Apple of Discord which deals {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage before exploding dealing {TalentBurstDamage_Formula} [{TalentBurstDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

 • Enemies afflicted by the Apple effect are Crippled and Trembled

aspect.name: Aspect of Loyalty
aspect.description: Unchained gains additional Protection Scaling and Stun Duration. Seething Howl applies to all allies in the area around him, and their Lifesteal Heals Fenrir, but the Strength it provides is decreased. Brutalize deals less damage but applies a stacking Slow, provides increased Protections, and the Protections persists afterwards.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Savagely Leap forward, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage when you land.

  • When Empowered, Stun all enemies in the area, then remove all Runes
  • If not Empowered, gain 3 Runes
abilityOverrides.A02:
Unleash a howl, providing increased Strength, Attack Speed, and Lifesteal to yourself and nearby allies.

  • Gain 2 Runes
  • Buffed allies heal Fenrir for 30% of their healing from lifesteal
abilityOverrides.A03:
Gain Protections, Leap forward, and grab onto an enemy, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage repeatedly to all nearby enemies.

  • You are Displacement Immune while Channeling
  • When Empowered, deal increased {TalentIncreasedDamage_Formula} [{TalentIncreasedDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage repeatedly instead, then all Runes are consumed
  • If not Empowered, gain 1 Rune per successful hit
  • Reduces enemy Healing

aspect.name: Aspect of the Triumphant
aspect.description: Ohm no longer silences but damages enemies and provides Movement Speed. Turn of Fate’s mark only procs when you hit the marked enemy with an ability. You no longer bestow kills to allies but each god kill provides permanent Cooldown Rate. Dharmic Pillars no longer slows and has a longer Cooldown.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Send a curse forward dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies it passes through. For each enemy hit, all nearby allied gods gain Bonus Damage.

• Enemy gods are marked for 5s. Damaging them with any of your abilities consumes the mark to deal bonus Magical Damage.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Rise into the lotus postion dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in front of you and increasing Movement Speed of nearby allied gods.

• You are Displacement and Slow Immune while channeling
abilityOverrides.A04:
Summon 4 Great Pillars to imprison your enemies. Enemies that pass the field between each pillar take an initial hit of {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and have their Protections reduced.

• Enemies continue to take {TickDamage_Formula} [{TickDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage if they stay in the field.
• Minions take 40% reduced damage from this ability

aspect.name: Aspect of Calamity
aspect.description: Geb's attacks are ranged, travel slowly, and pierce with damage falloff. Shockwave deals circular damage, Crits, triggers on-hits, and grants Attack Speed on god hit. Stone Shield is self-only and buffs attack damage. Cataclysm causes Knockback rather than a Stun. -7.5% Base Health, -5% Base Protections.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Charge forward, stopping on the first enemy god hit.
   • Enemies hit take {Damage_Formula} [{CTScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and are Slowed
   • Your speed increases over 3s before becoming CC Immune and causing enemy gods hit to be Knocked Back
   • After 3s this ability can be refired to Leap forward, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Knocking Up enemies hit
abilityOverrides.A02:
Create a shock wave around you, dealing {Damage_Talent_Formula} [{Damage_Talent_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

• Gain 15% Attack Speed for 5s for each god hit (max 3).
• Can crit and apply on attack hit effects.

aspect.name: Aspect of Shamash
aspect.description: Winds of Shamash is no longer an ultimate. Place a wind wall that transforms once with your next ability: ignites from Sun-forged Scimitar, solidifies from Drop Kick, or launches allies from Hero's Advance. It can only transform once, granting you Attack Speed, Tenacity, or Pathfinding until its next transform.

aspect.name: Aspect of the General
aspect.description: Battle Fervor now provides Intelligence instead of Attack Speed. Conviction now applies an additional Heal over Time and will share Protections from Taolu Assault. However, Guan Yu loses all Strength scaling and reduced Intelligence damage scaling.

aspect.name: Aspect of Ruin
aspect.description: Spell Eater can no longer be refired but instead reduces enemy ability damage in the area. Additionally, each time an enemy ability is cast a projectile lands and explodes at their location. Its Cooldown is increased.

abilityOverrides.A02:
Create a Sigil that decreases enemy god ability damage done in a large area for 4s.

  • A projectile is fired when enemy gods activate abilities, exploding and dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies in the targeted area

aspect.name: Aspect of Preservation
aspect.description: Mitigate Wounds no longer Heals based on damage taken or provides Attack Speed. Instead you gain a stack when you or nearby allied gods take damage from Basic Attacks and when the ability ends, stacks are expended to Heal nearby allied gods. +7.5% Base Health.

abilityOverrides.A03:
Immediately Heal yourself for {Heal_Formula} and gain Protections for 4s.

  • While the Buff is active, each time you or a nearby ally gets hit with a Basic Attack, you gain a stack
  • At the end of the duration, Heal yourself and nearby allies for {TalentHealPerStack} per stack

aspect.name: Aspect of Disruption
aspect.description: Infused Strikes Slow gods hit by them, but do not deal bonus damage or provide the stacking Strength buff. Overhand Smash Stuns gods hit by it, but deals reduced damage. Sacred Monkey has reduced Scaling.

abilityOverrides.A03: Throw a projectile monkey that deals {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to any enemies it hits. After hitting, it will bounce to nearby enemies applying a Mark to only the most recently hit enemy. Reactivate this ability to Teleport to the Marked enemy.

abilityOverrides.A01: Imbue your arrows with heavenly light for 6s. Gain Attack Speed.  Each hit applies Storm's Kiss to you for the duration.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Call down four lightning strikes, dealing {StrikeDamage_Formula} [{StrikeDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage per strike to enemies in the area.

  • Each strike grants a small stacking Movement Speed bonus
  • Hitting an enemy god grants one  Storm's Kiss stack
  • Enemies hit by more than one strike are Mesmerized
abilityOverrides.A03:
Dash forward with your blades, dealing {ChargeDamage_Formula} [{ChargeDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies in your path.

  • Hitting an enemy god consumes your Storm's Kiss stacks
  • Hitting an enemy god Roots them for 1s as you backflip away and loose an arrow that deals {ArrowDamage_Formula} [{ArrowDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage in an area around them and can Critically Strike and trigger on-hit item effects
  • At 8 or more Storm's Kiss stacks consumed, that arrow deals additional {TalentStormKissArrowBonus_Formula} [{TalentStormKissArrowBonus_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage
  • At 15 or more stacks consumed, the main target explodes when you land for {TalentStormKissExplosion_Formula} [{TalentStormKissExplosion_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage over double the usual area

aspect.name: Aspect of the Unyielding
aspect.description: Toxic clouds do not deal tick damage but allied gods within them gain Damage Reduction. Within them, you do not gain Cooling but lower cooldown for Venomous Haze. Consuming Bellow does not deal bonus damage but allies gain INT and STR. Submerge Knockup height is increased.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Fire noxious spit at an area dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and creating a toxic cloud that persists for 20s.

  • The cloud Slows and reduces enemy Healing.
  • While within the cloud allies take reduced damage and this ability cooldown is reduced.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Channel briefly, drawing power from nearby toxic clouds, then roar to deal {Damage_Formula} [{DamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage, Slow, and Tremble enemies around you while nearby allies gain Intelligence and Strength.

  • Each cloud Empowers you and the roar, increasing its size.
  • While Empowered, your Basic Attacks fire at their maximum rate.

aspect.name: Aspect of Unbound Destruction
aspect.description: Kali's Basics are ranged. Rupture procs at 5 stacks to deal damage & heal her. Incense doesn't stun or proc Rupture but knocks back & applies Rupture. Destruction doesn't damage, prevent death, or give immunities but gives stats, has a lower cooldown, resets cooldown on Mark kills, makes her Basics apply 2 Rupture stacks & pierce.

aspect.name: Aspect of Laceration
aspect.description: Abduct no longer Pulls enemy gods but Roots them in place with you, dealing constant Basic Attack Damage for the duration. No longer gain Protections from Abduct.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Lunge forward, grabbing and Rooting the first enemy god hit.

• The initial hit does {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and then rapid ticks of Bonus Basic Attack Damage
• The lunge damages enemies you pass through

aspect.name: Aspect of the Squall
aspect.description: You gain Mana from Jungle monster kills and god kills and assists. Zephyr has a shorter range but fires 3 projectiles. Slipstream is always a dash and steals protections. Whirlwind attaches to you and explodes in a blast that knocks back enemies.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Blow three breezy projectiles that deal {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies hit.

  • Damaged enemies are also Slowed
  • Subsequent projectile hits deal reduced damage
abilityOverrides.A02:
Summon the wind to Dash, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Slowing enemies hit.

  • You gain Slow Immunity and Movement Speed that fades over time
  • Enemies hit lose Protections
abilityOverrides.A03:
Create a Whirlwind that follows you exploding in a blast of wind after a delay, dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Knocking Back enemies hit.

  • Affected enemies repeatedly take {TalentTickDamage_Formula} [{TalentTickDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage over time

aspect.name: Aspect of Agony
aspect.description: Vanish no longer grants Stealth; its attack now inflicts Blind instead of Bleed. Agonizing Visions can be cast on allies, providing damage mitigation while slowing enemies. Behind You now deals bonus damage scaling with your Health and Protections rather than its percentage increase.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Gain Movement Speed and Empower your next attack, causing it to Blind enemies hit. 

  • Killing a god resets the cooldown of this ability
  • You are immune to slows while buffed.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Summon a vision of Loki that repeatedly deals Physical Damage and  enemies. Casting this on allies makes them the source of damage and grants them Damage Mitigation.

  • Damaged enemies have reduced damage
  • Enemies hit four times are Blinded

aspect.name: Aspect of Pandemonium
aspect.description: Elemental Mastery has a reduced cooldown and each time it is used, a random Stance is selected with 2 random primary abilities, Flicker will always persist. Using Elemental Mastery provides an Intelligence buff for a short duration.

abilityOverrides.A04:
Tap into your inner potential, exploding with energy in your current stance dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies hit.
  • On use, a random Stance is selected with 2 random primary abilities and you gain Intelligence for a short duration
  • After the explosion reaches its apex, it collapses in on itself dealing Magical Damage again
  • Enemies suffer different effects depending on which stance's energy they are being hit by

aspect.name: Aspect of Rage
aspect.description: Basic attacks while Bloodrage is active no longer provide bonus Protections or Attack Speed but instead your non-ultimate and non-passive ability cooldowns are lowered. Additionally Shoulder Charge deals more damage if it has hit an enemy god recently.

abilityOverrides.A02:
Deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies around you, then gain increased Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

   • While buffed, basic attack hits on enemies reduce your non-ultimate and non-passive ability cooldowns
   • Hitting an enemy god with the initial hit of this attack applies two stacks of Protection debuff to enemy gods and Protection Buff for yourself

aspect.name: Aspect of the Cursed Crown
aspect.description: Your Basic Attacks are now melee. You gain Wrath over time and when you deal damage. Consuming Power has two levels that can be used at 40 and 80 Wrath. Sigil Mastery fires all 3 Sigils simultaneously. Shroud of Wildfire Attack explosions deal a percentage of your Max Health as damage.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Summon three crashing swords, each imbued by a sigil, dealing {AreaDamage_Formula} [{AreaDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage before exploding dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

• Mark of Mind, Fear enemy gods away from the center of the sigil
• Mark of Body, Slows enemies hit
• Mark of Soul, spawn a clone at the enemy god location
abilityOverrides.A03:
Send out Wildfire that explodes at max range or when it hits an enemy god, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage in a small area and afflicts enemies with a Debuff.
Enemies debuffed take {TickDamage_Formula} [{TickDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.
Enemy gods and Jungle Bosses debuffed explode for {TalentAreaDamage_Formula} [{TalentAreaDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage when hit by your Attacks.
If an enemy uses a Movement ability while debuffed, they take {BurstDamage_Formula} [{BurstDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and the debuff is removed.

• Using this ability increases your Movement Speed for a short duration
• Your Attacks extend the debuff on enemies
• Applies Mark of Matter to enemy gods hit
abilityOverrides.A04: Hit all enemies in front of you and additionally consume Marks from enemy gods dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Healing you for [{Heal}].

aspect.name: Aspect of Wind
aspect.description: Broken Weave explosions no longer Root enemies and the Buff has a reduced duration however the Attack Speed gained is much higher. Additionally using World Weaver provides stacks of Broken Weave.

aspect.name: Aspect of Shining Mist
aspect.description: Mysterious Fog travels slightly before stopping, allowing you to fire Attacks within it and remain Stealthed. Shining Metal and Fire Shards scale with Attack Power, and procs Attack Item Effects. Attacks reduce the Cooldown of Shining Metal. Additionally Strength of Fire also provides Attack Speed.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Send a dense fog slowly forward that deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage when it touches an enemy. Enemies that remain in the fog take additional damage every second. You and Allied Gods are Stealthed when inside the fog.

  • Gain Strength of Water, which gives you Movement Speed. Allied gods that enter the fog gain Strength of Water.
  • You may Basic Attack while within the fog and remain Stealthed.
abilityOverrides.A03:
Launch a projectile dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies it passes through.

  • If the projectile hits a Clay Soldier it explodes, dealing damage in an area and Stunning enemies and towers.
  • Gain Strength of Metal, causing your Basic Attacks to deal Magical Damage in an area when you hit an enemy.
abilityOverrides.A04:
Become CC Immune and ascend into the air. You and your team gain visibility on all enemy gods. Summon Fire Shards that deal {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentScalingDesc_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to each enemy god.

  • Gain Strength of Fire, providing Attack Speed and causes your Basic Attacks to go farther and faster.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Cosmos
aspect.description: Flux becomes Cosmic Flux (Mitigation, decays). Decaying past 10 stacks Heals allies. Base Damage +10%, Scaling -25%. Convergence grants a version of itself to allies on God hit. Crashing Comet Stuns and Slows, but takes longer to land. Warp grants CC Immunity to self and 1 nearby ally. -12.5% Attack Damage.

aspect.name: Odin_01
aspect.description: Placeholder Desc

aspect.name: Aspect of Obsidian
aspect.description: You only gain Fuel from Pyroclast and when damaged by enemies instead of over time. Magma Rush can no longer be refired but now provides Healing. Additionally Everlasting Flame now provides Protections instead of Strength and Lifesteal, and Volcanic Lightning damage no longer has Strength Scaling.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Fires a Magma projectile that deals {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and grants fuel once on hitting an enemy. At max range the Magma persists and fires additional shard projectiles back to you, dealing {ReturnDamage_Formula} [{ReturnDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies. 

  • The number of shards returning is dependent on the rank of this ability. 
  • Pele has 2 charges of this ability.
abilityOverrides.A03:
Repeatedly deal {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to nearby enemies and gain movement speed while this ability is active. Magma Rush uses Fuel for its duration and has no cooldown. 

  • While active you gain {TalentHeal} Health over time and additional movement speed.
  • Damage, healing and movement speed is increased when above 50 Fuel.
abilityOverrides.A04:
Become CC Immune then Dash forward dealing {Damage} Physical Damage and Slowing the first enemy God hit, and firing a cone attack that deals {ConeDamage} Physical Damage to other enemies. 

  • For the next 10 seconds or 4 attacks, every time you basic attack an enemy, you deal reduced damage and also fire a cone attack.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Trident
aspect.description: Poseidon’s basic attacks always fire side waves. Trident no longer affects Tidal Surge but can be activated to focus the side waves, causing them to pierce enemies, and both abilities deal extra basic attack damage.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Summon a wave, dealing {Talent_Damage_Formula} [{DamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Knock Back enemies.

  • Tide Cost -15%
  • These waves pass through everything
abilityOverrides.A02:
Activate your Trident, gaining increased Attack Speed, Movement Speed, and Basic Attack Damage. While activated, your basic attack side projectiles focus in and deal bonus damage.

  • The additional Basic Attack shots pass through all enemies, apply basic attack damage and do not trigger on-hit effects
  • This ability does not cost Tide

aspect.name: Aspect of Thermotherapy
aspect.description: Solar Blessing and Searing Pain only deal base damage with no scaling. In return, Solar Blessing can be placed on allied gods, attaching to them and Searing Pain Heals allies hit.

abilityOverrides.A03:
Summon a pillar of blessed light repeatedly dealing {Damage} Magical Damage and Healing allies for {Heal} Health.

 • The light empowers you and allied gods in the area, granting Strength, Intelligence, Physical Protection, and Magical Protection
 • The pillar can be placed on allies to attach and follow them
abilityOverrides.A04: Blast enemies in front of you with a wave of extreme heat, dealing {Damage} Magical Damageand Healing yourself and allies for {TalentHeal} Health.

aspect.name: Aspect of Precision
aspect.description: Astral Strike is always active, but you have severely decreased Attack Speed and no longer regen Astral Arrows. When out of Astral Arrows, reload. While Infinite Arrows is active, Astral Arrows are not consumed.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Your Basic Attacks are more powerful, dealing an additional {BonusDamage_Formula} [{BonusDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage, piercing, and Slowing enemies.

• Each Basic Attack consumes 1 Astral Arrow.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Thickbark
aspect.description: Your tier 3 Acorn effects change. Briskberry causes Dart to knockback enemy gods, marking them to explode. Ashwhorl provides Flurry 2 charges, protections and healing. Thistlethorn causes Acorn Blast to fire 5 projectiles and debuffs enemies.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Dash forward, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Slowing enemies hit, stopping on enemy gods.
  • Cooldown is reduced when dealing damage to enemy gods with other abilities. Once per ability, per god.

Briskberry Acorn
  • Knockback enemy gods hit, marking them to explode for {AreaDamage_Formula} [{AreaDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage after a short delay.
abilityOverrides.A02:
Spin 4 times and deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies around you, reducing their Physical Protection.

Ashwhorl Acorn
  • Flurry provides Physical Protection when hitting enemy gods and has an additional charge. Dealing damage with abilities Heals you.
abilityOverrides.A03:
Fire a blast of 3 Acorns that deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage. Enemies hit by 3 Acorns are Stunned.

Thistlethorn Acorn
  • Acorn Blast fires 5 Acorns debuffing enemies hit, causing them to take bonus damage from your abilities for a short duration. Stacking up to 3 times.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Devourer
aspect.description: Your abilities give Mana on damaging enemies instead of spending. I'm a Monster can be used when at full Mana, using it all. It no longer provides Movement Speed, but can be fired 3 times and damage scales only from Max Mana. Its stacks provide max Mana and at max rank you gain bonus Mana. Sentinel's Empowered attack also scales with Max Mana, but no longer Cooldown Reduces itself.

abilityOverrides.A04:
All of your Mana is consumed as you become CC Immune for the next 6s. This ability can be reactivated up to 3 times dealing {TalentDamage_Formula} [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage at the target area.

  • 100% Mana is required to cast this ability.
  • Whenever this ability deals damage to enemy gods you gain 1 stack, killing enemy gods provides 3. Each stack provides max Mana and at max rank, you gain bonus Mana and Mana Regen.

aspect.name: Aspect of Prey
aspect.description: Charge Prey now passes through all targets, knocks them forward, and has bonus scaling. Sickening Strike deals increased damage against Jungle Monsters and the cooldown reduction now triggers off Jungle Monsters.

abilityOverrides.A03: The initial damage from this ability does increased damage against jungle monsters.

aspect.name: Aspect of Conflagration
aspect.description: Sol's Heat provides Intelligence and Ability Damage, but no longer provides Strength, Attack Speed, and Basic Attack Damage. Sol erupts and deals damage around her when becomes immune in Disapparate.

aspect.name: Aspect of Transformation
aspect.description: 72 Transformations has a reduced Cooldown and locks your animal form until Somersault Cloud is used. Locking in Ox form causes Master’s Will to Knockup, Tiger form provides stacking Attack Speed on hits of The Magic Cudgel and Eagle form causes your other two non-ultimate abilities to have a reduced Cooldown.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Slam down with your Cudgel, dealing {CloseDamage_Formula} [{CloseScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies closeby,
or dealing {FarDamage_Formula} [{FarScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies further away.

  • This ability has reduced Strength Scaling but increased Intelligence Scaling to enemies that are further away
  • Intelligence increases the length of this ability
  • Blessing of the Tiger - Enemies hit by this ability provide you increasing Attack Speed
abilityOverrides.A02:
Strike around you dealing {CloseDamage_Formula} [{CloseScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies closeby,
or dealing {FarDamage_Formula} [{FarScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies further away.
Enemies hit are Slowed and have reduced Attack Speed

  • This ability has reduced Strength Scaling but increased Intelligence Scaling to enemies that are further away
  • Intelligence increases the radius of this ability
  • Blessing of the Ox - Enemies hit by this ability are Knocked Up
abilityOverrides.A03:
Transform into an Ox, Tiger or Eagle, and charge forward. Using this ability locks you into the transformation picked until Somersault Cloud is used, however you do gain a new effect based on the form chosen.

  • Ox : Knockback enemies in your path, dealing {OxDamage_Formula} [{OxDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
Blessing of the Ox causes Master's Will to knockup enemies hit.
  • Tiger : Maul the first enemy you hit, dealing {TigerDamage_Formula} [{TigerDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Stunning them.
Blessing of the Tiger causes The Magic Cudgel to provide Attack Speed on hitting enemies.
  • Eagle : Is the fastest of the three forms. Blessing of the Eagle causes your other non-ultimate abilities to have reduced cooldowns.

aspect.name: Aspect of Grover's Wrath
aspect.description: Attacks: +15% damage to targets debuffed by Sylvanus. Wisp’s Heal, Protections, and Ultimate Knockup reduced by 40%. Nature’s Grasp tethers, dealing damage, slowing, and granting Sylvanus Haste. Gain Anger (+Attack Speed) when Verdant Growth/Ally dies; +2 on Ultimate cast. At 4 stacks, Enrage: +Attack Speed and a free Wisps or Nature’s Grasp cast.

aspect.name: Aspect of Reaping
aspect.description: Harvester of Souls no longer Heals Thanatos but provides permanent Max Health. Additionally Soul Reap deals bonus damage and Heals Thanatos based on his Max Health.

abilityOverrides.A03:
Swing your scythe, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Silencing enemies in front of you.

  • Deal additional Physical Damage based off your max Health
  • Gain Healing per enemy hit, based off your max Health

aspect.name: Aspect of Mischief
aspect.description: Confusion no longer Stealths you but on refire, you swap positions with your clone.

abilityOverrides.A03:
Create a phantom clone of yourself and gain Movement Speed.

  • The clone will walk to your target location
  • Refire this ability to swap positions with the clone

aspect.name: Aspect of Thunderstruck
aspect.description: Thunderstruck is always active but chains for less damage. Triggering it 3 times on a god heals Thor, slowing and trembling them. Warrior’s Madness grants Protections instead of Strength. Mjolnir’s Attunement no longer deals bonus damage, and his abilities have less scaling.

aspect.name: Aspect of Fortification
aspect.description:
Vulcan's Passive gains: Being near one of your turrets grants you and the turret increased Protections and Health Regeneration. 

Backfire and Magma Bomb have lower Damage Scaling.

aspect.name: Aspect of the Nightstalker
aspect.description: Branching Bola is no longer a toggle but provides 3 fires of ability based projectiles. Poison Darts requires less hits to deal full damage. Darkest of Nights loses existing buffs but provides increased ability damage.

abilityOverrides.A01: Your next 3 Basic Attacks fire large projectiles that deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
abilityOverrides.A02: Enemies can only be hit by 3 darts, with each after the first doing reduced damage.
abilityOverrides.A04:
Shroud enemy gods in darkness, creating an area they cannot see out of. During this time your abilities deal increased damage.

• If an enemy god leaves the area, they are affected by a decaying Slow.

aspect.name: Aspect of Downpour
aspect.description: Yemoja’s abilities have higher Intelligence Scaling. Mending Waters no longer affects allies but stops and bounces on enemy gods, dealing damage, shield damage, and grants Intelligence per hit. Moonstrike no longer stuns.

abilityOverrides.A01:
Toss a bubble that bounces twice, dealing {DamageTalent_Formula} [{DamageTalent_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Slows enemies before exploding into smaller bubbles.
   • Small bubbles deal {Damage_SmallTalent_Formula} [{Damage_SmallTalent_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage
abilityOverrides.A02:
Fire a water wave, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies. This wave stops and bounces between enemy gods.
  • Each time an enemy god is hit, Yemoja gains a stacking Intelligence buff for a short duration
  • The first hit does full damage while subsequent hits deal 65%
  • This ability also does bonus damage to enemy Health Shields
abilityOverrides.A04:
Conjure two large walls of water that block enemy movement and projectiles. After a delay they crash down dealing {DamageTalent_Formula} [{DamageTalent_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage, Trembling and Slowing enemies hit.
  • Allies impacted by the crashing waves gain Omi Healing and Moonstrike's buff
  • You gain a buff of increased Omi over time on using this ability
